name: OrbitFlow
description: A distributed workflow orchestration engine built from scratch

name: SecureVault
description: Secure file storage system using FastAPI with encryption, blockchain integrity, and multi-interface access support

name: DevBrain
description: An AI-powered observability and debugging platform for distributed systems with real-time log ingestion, anomaly detection, and deep learning-based root cause analysis.

name: PulseIQ
description: A real-time decision intelligence engine that ingests and analyzes live data streams. Computes rolling metrics and detects anomalies instantly without heavy cloud dependencies.
